name: fund-admin-pack
description: Fund administration workflows for GL reconciliation, break tracing, accruals, roll-forwards, variance commentary, and NAV tie-out.
author: CoWork OS

skills.name: GL Reconciliation
skills.description: Prepare GL reconciliation workpapers and exception lists.
skills.prompt: Prepare a GL reconciliation from provided ledger, subledger, statement, or support files. Return tie-out tables, unreconciled breaks, possible drivers, source-ledger entries, and a review checkpoint. Do not post journal entries or mark the reconciliation complete.

skills.name: Break Tracing
skills.description: Trace reconciliation breaks to source records and likely causes.
skills.prompt: Trace breaks between finance records. For each break, list amount, date, accounts/entities, source records reviewed, likely cause, evidence, owner, and next action. Stage all conclusions for controller review.

skills.name: Accrual Schedule
skills.description: Draft accrual schedules with support and review status.
skills.prompt: Draft an accrual schedule from available contracts, invoices, prior accruals, and support. Include assumptions, period allocation, source support, checks, and required approval. Do not post entries.

skills.name: Roll-Forward
skills.description: Prepare roll-forward workpapers and movement explanations.
skills.prompt: Prepare a roll-forward workpaper. Show beginning balance, additions, reductions, transfers, FX or valuation movement, ending balance, source support, and unresolved exceptions.

skills.name: Variance Commentary
skills.description: Draft variance explanations tied to source evidence.
skills.prompt: Draft variance commentary for financial close or fund admin reporting. Quantify each variance, identify source-backed drivers, separate timing from permanent differences, and list follow-up questions.

skills.name: NAV Tie-Out
skills.description: Tie out NAV workpapers and surface differences.
skills.prompt: Prepare a NAV tie-out. Compare trial balance, investor allocations, portfolio valuations, cash, expenses, and support schedules. Return differences, source references, and review actions. Do not approve NAV.
